content: my friend blazed through it, she got an early access key from friends or devs
But her taste is hit or miss
sometimes she's got really good taste
but she also unironically loves Genshin writing
genshin writing is fucked by the gameplay loop anyway
FallStreak is probably the greatest 'hidden gem' indie VN I can recommend
so its hard to take at face value
Fallstreak 2 is one of the best short VNs I've played in years
I've spoken to the author a few times
even gave me the trashed script for FS2, which is wildly different and basically an LN
need to finish work so im leaving the browser tab open
1 is like an 8/10 with a clumsy as hell segment
1.5 is short and only there for world building
you can measure the author's journey in his work, because his style changes drastically over the games
and altogether the games are less than 20 hours total
Alright, so, we do need to pin a recommendation from you for me to try though
would you truly recommend fallstreak as
Fallstreak 2 is a genuine 10/10, it just requires you to go through an 8/10, and then a mediocre VN
I actually played something very good
and the author grew a lot from it
I'll give out longer recs if you want em, but FallStreak is definitely the 'hidden gem' I want more people to play.
it wasn't a VN per se, but its totally one, with good gameplay
I bought it very early on
Yeah, I must say I truly love it
It's in my backlog, but I loved what the dev was doing
I wanted to support him so he'd make more
its finished, he did take a long time
Its very good, I'll tell you something
but it has a very post-game new game + experience
and even the new game + experience
You never see that in any other game
That's shot up my backlog quite a bit
The gameplay loop and its systems are fun
I'm fine with things starting slow
and the story was really really good
but it plays the clichés upside down on you
makes you believe things are simple
and fucks you in the back
Cliche doesn't matter to me as long as the execution is good
I will literally watch/play a series about going off to slay the demon lord as long as it's good
It does have that weird "damn I wish I was the protagonist" cringe moments
I just take it as a laughing moment
Oh yeah, my biggest criticism of Fallstreak
ah well I can live with that
I have a friend who can't play unvoiced VNs
its rare a VN is fully fully voiced nowadays, theres lots of "doc readin" that doesnt have inner monologues goin on
VNs feel like they're getting more voiced these days
I was actually surprised Saya was voiced
and with an incredibly famous VA as the MC, no less
And someone doodled in the steam page
And then got access to their servers and sent everyone enrollment in Mythag university
So if you applied you UID your data is now in the possession of Little N
Who knows what he is doing with it right now
i appreciate all the april fools fun
I have never once wished it was me. Never seems an enviable position keeper is in.
